title: Spoken, On Being Appointed To The Excise.
content:
Searching auld wives' barrels,
            Och, hon! the day!
        That clarty barm should stain my laurels;
            But, what'll ye say!
        These movin' things ca'd wives and weans
        Wad move the very hearts o' stanes!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Burns, titled "Spoken, On Being Appointed To The Excise.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
